asset_role: completed structure sprite for the Shrine of Origin / disc_origin_shrine landmark
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: top-down game structure sprite source, single completed structure frame. Subject: Shrine of Origin, a compact sacred stone-and-water shrine for a hex-grid garden. Central dark stone dais, low circular shrine ring, small golden cross-sigil/core glow, four subtle water channels or droplets implying the Origin water cross, tasteful Japanese-inspired shrine proportions without text. Camera: true high top-down game sprite, not isometric, no horizon. Composition/framing: one centered object with generous padding, designed to fit a 128x128 sprite frame and read at 64x64 in-game; no cropped silhouette. Palette/materials: slate stone, aged cedar wood, pale water-blue, soft warm gold glow; no chroma-key green in the subject. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. Constraints: one asset only, no sheet grid, no text, no watermark, no UI, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no floor plane, background must be a single uniform #00ff00 color with no gradients or texture, crisp separated edges.
